canonical_oracle.result: structured OPEN at run 63a2ec57-45d4-4c8e-86a0-c8614d2bd79a: 7/8 developer claims verified, including both H03 claims and their real fail/pass/restore controls; only the unimplemented H04 browser-editor claim remains open

claims.claim: The harness evaluator independently rejects false or stale evidence and composes only explicit profile claims.
claims.new_gate: bun run test tests/harness-contract.test.ts: 32/32 pass; typecheck and Biome pass
claims.post_integration_result: verified: 32/32 meta-contract cases, typecheck, and Biome pass on clean canonical main

claims.claim: Push-main CI calls one policy-defined bootstrap facade and retains structured evidence across early and command failures.
claims.source_of_truth: bun run test tests/harness-ci-mapping.test.ts && bun run verify:ci-bootstrap
claims.old_failure: no .github workflow or CI policy existed
claims.new_gate: semantic YAML/policy validation plus 16 adversarial topology mutations and full bootstrap runner
claims.post_integration_result: verified: GitHub Actions run 29173915202 succeeded and uploaded structured evidence

claims.claim: All owned TypeScript, React, Remotion, host Rust, and pinned macOS Rust surfaces are statically gated by independently bound commands.
claims.source_of_truth: bun run verify:fast --profile developer && bun run verify:fast --profile macos
claims.old_failure: viewer, Remotion, and Tauri Rust gates were outside the canonical fast profile
claims.new_gate: fixed root/nested script-body inventory plus real viewer and macOS-only Rust pass-fail-pass controls
claims.post_integration_result: verified: 101 files/1481 tests, both static profiles, H00 static claim, exact script no-op rejection, and macOS clippy sensitivity pass on clean canonical main

claims.claim: Hermetic runs, loopback mutation authority, all-exit-mode process cleanup, and the release-mode source/config webview policy are behaviorally proven.
claims.source_of_truth: bun run verify:fixture --json && bun run verify:webview-policy --profile release
claims.old_failure: tests shared mutable state, loopback writes lacked launch authority, and no outliving supervisor covered SIGKILL or timeout
claims.new_gate: isolated HOME/project/DB/socket fixtures, exact Host/Origin/token/cookie/nonce authority, PID/start-bound supervisor, and compiled exact-port Tauri navigation policy
claims.post_integration_result: verified: exact four-claim H00 run 6d38e53c-0d85-42d7-9000-424c7ff355d3 passed with zero issues; 104 files/1498 tests and static profile passed on clean canonical main

claims.claim: The real Tauri process and its final localhost WKWebView complete a bound edit/save lifecycle without exposing production automation authority.
claims.old_failure: Vean had no repeatable driver for its actual WKWebView and no mechanical release-instrumentation exclusion proof
claims.new_gate: feature-and-runtime-gated embedded WebDriver, pinned Node LTS, exact app/sidecar/listener identity, deep action-to-saved-IR truth, and real feature-mutant release scanner
claims.post_integration_result: verified: canonical H00 run 28e43e1f-e3f6-483a-8030-4121853a5d86 passed with zero issues; real instrumentation baseline/mutant/restore passed; 107 files/1525 tests and macOS static profile passed

claims.claim: The H06 development app exposes native menus, file panels, window lifecycle, focus restoration, and semantic Quit through a fixture-owned Mac2 session.
claims.old_failure: Vean had no native-shell driver, no Mac2 doctor, and no semantic native accessibility ledger
claims.new_gate: pinned Node 24.15.0, Appium 3.5.2, and Mac2 4.0.3; fixture-owned APPIUM_HOME; exact process/app/session identity; semantic native scenarios; residual-dialog and real Rust-label controls; all-exit cleanup
claims.post_integration_result: in_progress: dedicated Tart guest doctor returned MACOS_DRIVER_READY with a real 58 KB accessibility tree and live Mac2 session; two safely cleaned full-app runs exposed and fixed unsupported predicate and execute-argument bugs; final native baseline/control rerun remains pending

claims.claim: Timeline keyboard, focus, selection, edit-mode, announcement, and pointer-parity semantics are explicitly approved and immutable for H03 implementation.
claims.old_failure: the product contract remained proposed and H03 could not bind implementation evidence to an approved semantic decision
claims.new_gate: H03 and H06 scenario ledgers must reference the exact timeline-a11y-v1 path and SHA-256
claims.post_integration_result: approved by Tejas without modification on 2026-07-11; H03 dispatch authorized

claims.claim: React component state, approved keyboard semantics, pointer parity, persisted MLT truth, and automated DOM accessibility pass in real headless Chromium.
claims.source_of_truth: bun run verify:component && bun run verify:component --suite accessibility
claims.old_failure: component and DOM-accessibility claims had no executable browser oracle or aggregate evidence envelope
claims.new_gate: 23 approved headless Chromium scenarios, axe checks, exact timeline-a11y-v1 binding, seven pointer/keyboard parity families, independently reparsed persisted .mlt truth, exact authority hashes, and two real product-source sensitivity controls
claims.post_integration_result: verified: H00 developer run 63a2ec57-45d4-4c8e-86a0-c8614d2bd79a accepted both H03 claims and their fail/reason-code/restore controls; direct suites each passed all 23 scenarios with zero cleanup findings

claims.claim: Native macOS automation is isolated from the human desktop in a reproducible persistent Tart guest.
claims.source_of_truth: bun run vm:macos:doctor && bun run vm:macos:doctor-guest
claims.old_failure: Mac2 and Xcode shared the active host login session and could take over the user's screen
claims.new_gate: immutable Tahoe/Xcode image digest, fixed 8 vCPU/32 GiB/200 GB profile, headless-only Tart flags, guest-local clean clone, strict private-IP SSH fallback, pinned toolchains, and two-variable dedicated-runner policy
claims.post_integration_result: verified environment: macOS 26.4 build 25E246, Xcode 26.5, VirtualMac2,1, key-only strict SSH, Node 24.15.0, Bun 1.3.14, Rust 1.95.0, MLT 7.40.0, and MACOS_DRIVER_READY; host retained 84% free memory during native exercise
